CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENSING, GLENN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF GLENN MENSING'S MOTION TO STRIKE UNVERIFIED ANSWER TO VERIFIED COMPLAINT AND ENTER DEFAULT OR JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY. (CODE CIV. PROC. 435(B); CAL. RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1322.) HOWEVER, THE COURT STRIKES THE ANSWER, SUA SPONTE, WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. (CODE CIV. PROC. 436(B).) AN ANSWER TO A VERIFIED COMPLAINT MUST BE VERIFIED. (CODE CIV. PROC. 446(A).) FURTHER, DEFENDANTS LIU AND DE LOS REYES ARE NOT CALIFORNIA LICENSED ATTORNEYS AND THUS CANNOT REPRESENT THE CORPORATE DEFENDANTS, STANFORD ASSET GROUP, INC. OR LAKESHORE FINANCIAL SERVICES AKA LAKESHORE FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Unverified Answer To Verified Complaint And Enter Default Or Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - GLENN MENSING, TEL. NO. 850-8730, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
HEIDI DE LOS REYES, TEL. NO. (510) 303-8443, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GLENN MENSING'S Motion To Strike Unverified Answer To Verified Complaint And Enter Default Or Judgment is
Denied. The motion is untimely. (Code Civ. Proc. 435(b); Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1322.) However, the court strikes the answer, sua sponte, with 30 days leave to amend. (Code Civ. Proc. 436(b).) An answer to a verified complaint must be verified. (Code Civ. Proc. 446(a).) Further, Defendants Liu and De Los Reyes are not California licensed attorneys and thus cannot represent the corporate defendants, Stanford Asset Group, Inc. or Lakeshore Financial Services aka Lakeshore Financial Services, Inc. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
